name: Catnap
description: Catnap is the Bigger Body of the Catnap plush. Catnap is from a cartoon show called “Smiling Critters”. Catnap was one of the Bigger Bodies that went rouge in “The Hour of Joy”. Catnap doesn’t speak much, but he was in of the orphans in the playcare, now he roams the playcare orphanage and turns it into a church to worship “The Prototype”.
creator: B19fusion83
